children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary of Transportation, acting through the Administrator of the Maritime Administration (in this section referred to as the “Administrator”), may establish a Port of Guam Improvement Enterprise Program (in this section referred to as the “Program”) to provide for the planning, design, and construction of projects for the Port of Guam to improve facilities, relieve port congestion, and provide greater access to port facilities.
receive funds provided for the Program from Federal and non-Federal entities, including private entities;

provide for coordination among appropriate governmental agencies to expedite the review process under the National Environmental Policy Act of 1969 ( et seq.) for projects carried out under the Program;42 U.S.C. 4321
provide for coordination among appropriate governmental agencies in connection with other reviews and requirements applicable to projects carried out under the Program; and
provide technical assistance to the Port Authority of Guam (and its agents) as needed for projects carried out under the Program.

children.heading: Port of Guam Improvement Enterprise Fund
children.label: c Port of Guam Improvement Enterprise Fund

children.heading: Establishment
children.label: 1 Establishment
children.text: There is established in the Treasury of the United States a separate account to be known as the “Port of Guam Improvement Enterprise Fund” (in this section referred to as the “Fund”).

children.label: A
children.text: amounts received by the Administrator from Federal and non-Federal sources under subsection (b)(1);

children.label: B
children.text: amounts transferred to the Administrator under subsection (d); and

children.label: C
children.text: amounts appropriated to carry out this section under subsection (f).

children.heading: Use of amounts
children.label: 3 Use of amounts
children.text: Amounts in the Fund shall be available to the Administrator to carry out the Program.

children.heading: Administrative expenses
children.label: 4 Administrative expenses
children.text: Not to exceed 3 percent of the amounts appropriated to the Fund for a fiscal year may be used for administrative expenses of the Administrator.

children.heading: Availability of amounts
children.label: 5 Availability of amounts
children.text: Amounts in the Fund shall remain available until expended.

children.heading: Transfers of amounts
children.label: d Transfers of amounts
children.text: Amounts appropriated or otherwise made available for any fiscal year for an intermodal or marine facility comprising a component of the Program shall be transferred to and administered by the Administrator.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: e Limitation
children.text: Nothing in this section shall be construed to authorize amounts made available under or any other amounts made available for the construction of highways or amounts otherwise not eligible for making port improvements to be deposited into the Fund.section 165 of title 23

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: f Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Fund such sums as may be necessary to carry out this section.
